textByHash.06163e4be04d9574c8420251806b46eb4ee3f255: Hello there! The weather here is wonderful, isn't it?
textByHash.410133af78a3b2d82732e2eacbe49b5b73484d56: They left through the front door and turned right, towards where they have those big birds.
textByHash.64b50469eb7fada3379e1e06f97d0bd293d9926a: Hi there. Hope you're enjoying your time in Varlamore.
textByHash.82604b658f3f6a61920908262f7607391caf73f3: Hello there, or should I say nilsal?
textByHash.a138b4158308a16bb34a2ff29ec2f9ae02f81353: Now you mention it, I did see somebody skulking around here recently... I thought they looked a little shifty at the time!
textByHash.ad1b4d3aef066a9b933cc07131ac0c1c84243038: Quetzals? You learn something new every day!
textByHash.b4b6883e958dee4a10e38f165c197e80d330e123: I can't wait to visit the rest of the kingdom!
